seo.homeTitle: Bizuply — Run your business. All in one place.
seo.homeDescription: A modern business platform with a professional business page, collaborations, CRM and AI.

home.subtitle: One smart platform to manage clients, appointments, CRM, collaborations, proposals and AI — everything connected in one premium workspace.

preview.aiMessage: I found 3 open time slots and prepared a proposal draft for your new client.

why.subtitle: Everything your business needs — CRM, clients, appointments, collaborations, automations and AI — in one simple, powerful platform.
why.panelTitle: Stop managing your business across disconnected tools.
why.panelText: BizUply brings your daily business operations into one beautiful workspace — so you can move faster, stay organized and grow with confidence.
why.workflowCollabText: Work with partners in one place
why.workflowAiText: Get summaries, insights and next actions
why.feature1Title: One platform instead of many tools
why.feature1Text: Manage clients, tasks, deals, appointments and automations in one clean workspace — without jumping between systems.
why.feature2Title: Built for real daily business work
why.feature2Text: Designed for real workflows, not theory. Fast actions, clear data and practical tools your business can use every day.
why.feature3Text: Start simple and unlock advanced CRM, collaboration, analytics and AI tools as your business grows.
why.bottomTitle: Built to replace scattered tools with one beautiful business OS.
why.bottomText: Start with what you need today, and unlock more powerful workflows as your business grows.

scrollStory.introTitle: Everything you need. In one dashboard.
scrollStory.introDescription: See performance, activity, reviews, appointments and insights — all connected in one beautiful workspace.
scrollStory.introSubtitle: See your business performance at a glance — activity, reviews, appointments and insights, all connected in one premium workspace.
scrollStory.pageDescription: Create a clean, professional page that represents your brand, showcases your services and helps clients connect faster.
scrollStory.collabDescription: Work with partners and other businesses — messages, proposals, agreements and shared activity in one place.
scrollStory.crmDescription: Manage clients, conversations, appointments and history — with every detail organized automatically.
scrollStory.aiDescription: Get smart recommendations, automated follow-ups and insights that help you decide what to do next — faster and better.
scrollStory.footerText: Manage your business page, clients, CRM, collaborations and AI tools from one beautiful workspace.

faqMini.subtitle: Everything you need to know about managing your business, clients, CRM, collaborations and AI inside Bizuply.
faqMini.stillText: Start with the FAQ, then explore how Bizuply can fit your workflow.
faqMini.ctaTitle: Ready to manage your business in one place?
faqMini.ctaText: Build your business workspace with CRM, collaborations, appointments and AI.
faqMini.a1Lead: Bizuply is an all-in-one platform that centralizes your business — business page, CRM, collaborations, and AI — so you can manage everything in one place.
faqMini.a1b1Text: Turn visitors into leads with a professional profile.
faqMini.a1b2Text: Track leads, clients, follow-ups, and pipeline stages.
faqMini.a1b3Text: Work with other businesses and manage proposals & deals.
faqMini.a1b4Text: Get smart suggestions and next-step actions to move faster.
faqMini.a1Footer: Everything stays connected — no more switching between scattered tools.
faqMini.q2: How does Bizuply help me get more clients?
faqMini.a2Lead: Bizuply helps you capture leads, respond faster, and stay consistent — which increases conversions over time.
faqMini.a2b1Text: Your business page turns traffic into inquiries.
faqMini.a2b2Text: CRM reminders and tasks keep leads warm.
faqMini.a2b3Text: A clear pipeline view helps you move opportunities forward.
faqMini.a2Footer: The result: fewer missed messages, faster follow-ups, and more closed clients.
faqMini.q3: What can I manage inside the CRM?
faqMini.a3Lead: Your CRM is where everything about a lead or client stays organized — so you always know what’s next.
faqMini.a3b1Text: Keep every contact and inquiry in one place.
faqMini.a3b2Text: Set reminders, next steps, and due dates.
faqMini.a3b3Text: Track conversations, status, and progress over time.
faqMini.a3b4Text: Move deals through steps so nothing gets stuck.
faqMini.a3Footer: No more spreadsheets or forgotten follow-ups — it’s all structured and searchable.
faqMini.q4: How does AI help in Bizuply?
faqMini.a4Lead: Bizuply AI helps you act faster by highlighting priorities and recommending next steps based on your activity.
faqMini.a4b1Text: Get recommended actions for leads and deals.
faqMini.a4b2Text: See what needs attention now — before it’s too late.
faqMini.a4b3Text: Draft better replies and follow-ups in less time.
faqMini.a4Footer: It’s like having a smart assistant inside your CRM — focused on results.

features.seoTitle: BizUply — All the Tools Your Business Needs in One Place
features.seoDescription: Explore BizUply features — an all-in-one platform combining CRM, chat, scheduling, reviews, collaborations, and AI tools for small businesses.
features.seoKeywords: BizUply, business platform, CRM, chat, reviews, scheduling, AI assistant, small business tools, SaaS, business management
features.heroTitleTop: All the tools your business needs
features.heroSubtitle: BizUply brings together your business page, CRM, messages, reviews, collaborations, appointments and AI insights — all inside one smart, beautiful workspace.
features.overviewTitle: Replace scattered tools with one connected workspace.
features.overviewText: Instead of managing clients in one place, messages in another, appointments somewhere else and AI separately — BizUply brings everything together.
features.card1Subtitle: Your business profile, built to convert.
features.card1Description: Every business gets a polished digital business page that presents your brand, services, availability and contact details in one professional place.
features.card1Point2: Logo, gallery and visual brand assets
features.card1Result: A clean, professional online presence that makes your business easier to find, trust and contact.
features.card2Subtitle: Know every client. Track every step.
features.card2Description: Manage relationships, tasks, notes, appointments and history in one organized CRM built for real service businesses.
features.card2Point2: Notes from calls, meetings and services
features.card2Result: All your client data, communication and next actions stay structured, searchable and easy to manage.
features.card3Description: Let clients contact you directly from your business page, then manage every message from a single organized dashboard.
features.card3Point1: Clients send messages from your page
features.card3Result: Client communication becomes centralized, organized and much easier to follow up on.
features.card4Description: Strengthen your reputation with public reviews, ratings and verified feedback that helps new clients choose your business.
features.card4Point5: More trust across the BizUply network
features.card4Result: Authentic feedback helps your business look more reliable, professional and ready to grow.
features.ctaText: From client management to AI insights, BizUply gives you the tools to operate more professionally and move faster.

solutions.seoTitle: BizUply — Smart Solutions for Every Type of Business
solutions.seoDescription: Discover BizUply's tailored solutions for every business type — from service providers and freelancers to shops and collaborations. Manage clients, communication, and growth in one smart place.
solutions.seoKeywords: BizUply solutions, small business tools, CRM, client management, AI assistant, business collaborations, service providers, freelancers, shops, SaaS platform
solutions.ogDescription: BizUply adapts to every business type with smart tools for management, communication, and automation.
solutions.heroSubtitle: Every business is unique — with its own clients, challenges and goals. BizUply adapts to your workflow with CRM, communication, collaborations and AI tools in one smart platform.
solutions.overviewTitle: Built for the way real businesses actually work.
solutions.overviewText: Whether you work from a studio, visit clients on-site, sell services online or collaborate with partners — BizUply gives you one connected workspace to manage it all.
solutions.card1Subtitle: Clinics, Trainers, Therapists, Hair & Beauty Professionals
solutions.card1Challenge: Managing clients, appointments, and daily communication can be overwhelming.
solutions.card1Solution: A smart CRM that keeps all client information, messages, appointments and reviews in one connected place.
solutions.card1Plus: Built-in live chat helps you stay connected and deliver a professional, personalized client experience.
solutions.card2Challenge: Communicating with clients while on the move is hard to manage.
solutions.card2Solution: A mobile-friendly business page with built-in chat, customer reviews and smart inquiry management.
solutions.card2Plus: Connect with complementary businesses nearby to build collaborations and expand your client base.
solutions.card3Challenge: Staying visible, organized and trusted in the digital space can be difficult.
solutions.card3Solution: A professional business profile with service listings, real client reviews and instant communication.
solutions.card3Plus: BizUply’s AI assistant helps you craft messages, track leads and make better decisions faster.
solutions.card4Subtitle: Studios, Shops, Local Businesses, Growing Teams
solutions.card4Challenge: Managing clients, messages and reviews across multiple channels quickly becomes messy.
solutions.card4Solution: Centralized communication and client management through one simple, beautiful interface.
solutions.card4Plus: Real-time insights and analytics help you understand performance and improve every week.
solutions.card5Challenge: Finding and managing partnerships with complementary businesses takes time and trust.
solutions.card5Solution: A built-in collaboration network designed to connect professionals, expand reach and boost profits together.
solutions.card5Plus: Every connection is built on transparency, trust and mutual growth — because businesses grow better together.
solutions.ctaText: No matter your field, BizUply adapts to your workflow — helping your business stay connected, efficient and ready to grow.

login.heroSubtitle: Manage your business page, CRM, clients, appointments, collaborations and AI tools from one premium workspace.
login.cardSubtitle: Access your BizUply workspace and continue managing your business.

pricing.heroSubtitle: All the tools your business needs — CRM, business page, messaging, reviews, collaborations, automations and AI insights — in one smart platform.
pricing.monthlyDescription: Full access to all BizUply features. Flexible monthly billing.
pricing.monthlyNote: Best for testing and growing month by month.
pricing.yearlyDescription: Best value for serious businesses. Save money and grow faster.

howItWorks.seoTitle: How It Works - Bizuply | Platform Guide
howItWorks.seoDescription: A simple guide on how Bizuply connects businesses with clients, manages appointments, and improves communication with smart automation tools.
howItWorks.seoKeywords: Bizuply, how it works, business management, scheduling, communication, automation, clients, SaaS
howItWorks.ogTitle: How Bizuply Works – Simple Platform Guide
howItWorks.ogDescription: Learn how Bizuply helps businesses manage clients, bookings, and collaborations in one smart system.
howItWorks.twitterTitle: How Bizuply Works – Simple Platform Guide
howItWorks.twitterDescription: Step-by-step guide to Bizuply: managing clients, booking services, and growing your business with smart automation.
howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Learn step by step how Bizuply helps businesses create a professional presence, manage clients, schedule services, communicate clearly and grow with smarter tools.
howItWorks.overviewTitle: Everything starts with one connected business workspace.
howItWorks.overviewText: Bizuply connects your business page, search visibility, appointments, messages, CRM, collaborations and activity data into one smooth experience.
howItWorks.overviewItem2Text: Search and filters help clients find you
howItWorks.timelineTitleTop: A clear process from first click
howItWorks.timelineSubtitle: Each step is designed to be simple, practical and connected to the next part of your business workflow.
howItWorks.step1Title: Create a business or client profile
howItWorks.step1Description: Set up your account in minutes and start using Bizuply as a business owner or as a client.
howItWorks.step1Business1: Click "Join as a Business" and fill out your basic details.
howItWorks.step1Business2: Upload your logo, images and set your business hours.
howItWorks.step1Business3: Choose the right plan for your business.
howItWorks.step1Business4: Result: You get a professional business page ready to welcome clients.
howItWorks.step1Client2: Fill in your name, email and password.
howItWorks.step1Client3: Result: Search businesses, book services and chat directly with providers.
howItWorks.step2Description: Clients can quickly find the right business using smart search, filters and clear business profiles.
howItWorks.step2Point2: Results can be based on ratings, location and availability.
howItWorks.step2Point3: Filter by price, reviews, category and business hours.
howItWorks.step2Point4: Result: Clients quickly find the exact business they need.
howItWorks.step3Description: Turn availability into bookings with a simple scheduling flow that keeps everyone updated.
howItWorks.step3Point1: Clients visit a business page and click "Book Now".
howItWorks.step3Point2: They view available calendar slots and get instant confirmation.
howItWorks.step3Point3: Automatic reminders help reduce missed appointments.
howItWorks.step3Point4: Result: Easier booking management for both sides.
howItWorks.step4Description: Keep client conversations and business-to-business collaborations in one connected workspace.
howItWorks.step4Point1: Clients can click "Send Message" from every business page.
howItWorks.step4Point2: Questions and requests go directly to the business owner.
howItWorks.step4Point4: Result: Easier communication, partnerships and referrals.
howItWorks.step5Description: Use the dashboard to understand what is happening in your business and decide what to do next.
howItWorks.step5Point1: Businesses can view dashboard data on visits, bookings and client activity.
howItWorks.step5Point2: Marketing tools help send promotions and updates.
howItWorks.step5Point3: Clients can view booking and appointment history.
howItWorks.step5Point4: Smart recommendations help clients discover better services.
howItWorks.simplicityText: Bizuply is designed so business owners can start fast, stay organized and manage daily work without complicated setup.
howItWorks.simplicityItem2Text: Notifications help clients and businesses stay updated.
howItWorks.simplicityItem3Text: Guidance is built into the flow.
howItWorks.ctaText: Create your business workspace, connect with clients and manage everything from one smart platform.

about.seoTitle: About BizUply | All-in-One Business Management Platform
about.seoDescription: Learn about BizUply — an all-in-one SaaS platform that helps business owners manage clients, communication, scheduling, and growth efficiently.
about.seoKeywords: BizUply, business management, SaaS platform, CRM, automation, AI tools, small business software, business collaboration
about.ogDescription: Discover BizUply — the smart business management platform that simplifies communication, collaboration, and growth.
about.twitterDescription: BizUply helps small and medium businesses manage clients, automation, and communication — all in one platform.
about.heroSubtitle: BizUply is a modern SaaS platform built to help business owners manage clients, communication, scheduling, collaborations, automation and growth — all from one connected workspace.
about.storyTitle: One platform for the work that usually lives everywhere.
about.storyText: Founded by entrepreneurs who understand real business challenges, BizUply was created to simplify management, strengthen client connections and support long-term growth.
about.storyItem1Text: Technology should work for business owners — not the other way around.
about.storyItem2Text: BizUply brings essential tools under one roof: CRM, scheduling, messaging, reviews, partnerships and AI.
about.storyItem3Text: We’re building a reliable digital workspace for small and medium businesses.
about.storyItem4Text: A smarter way to stay organized, connected and future-ready.
about.visionTitle: Powerful business tools should feel simple.
about.visionText: We believe technology should be accessible, practical and effective for every small and medium-sized business. BizUply empowers entrepreneurs to grow smarter by combining usability, innovation and real human connection.
about.journeyText: BizUply was founded with one goal — to bring essential business tools under one roof. Instead of managing separate systems for CRM, scheduling, messaging, reviews and partnerships, we created one unified platform.
about.offer1Text: Manage customer data, messages and relationships efficiently from one dashboard.
about.offer2Text: Showcase your services, reviews and chat directly with clients from one professional page.
about.offer3Text: Build credibility and trust with verified client feedback.
about.offer4Text: Connect with complementary businesses and create new growth opportunities.
about.offer5Text: Automate tasks, analyze activity and get smart recommendations to boost performance.
about.valuesText: BizUply is built on principles that make the platform useful, practical and focused on real business growth.
about.value1Text: Intuitive tools that empower you to focus on what truly matters.
about.value2Text: Practical solutions inspired by real business challenges.
about.value3Text: A growing network of professionals dedicated to shared success.
about.ctaText: BizUply helps businesses stay organized, connected and future-ready — so you can focus on leading, creating and growing.

contact.seoTitle: Contact Us - Bizuply | We're Here to Help
contact.seoDescription: Contact the Bizuply team for questions, support, and business inquiries.
contact.ogTitle: Contact Bizuply – We're Here to Help
contact.ogDescription: Reach out to the Bizuply team for support or questions.
contact.heroTitle: Let’s talk about your business growth.
contact.heroSubtitle: Have a question, need support, or want to learn how Bizuply can help your business? Send us a message and we’ll get back to you shortly.
contact.directEmailText: You can also email us directly for support, questions or business inquiries.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the details below and our team will contact you.
contact.success: Form submitted successfully! We’ll get back to you shortly.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.

shell.title: Business Control Center
shell.subtitle: Manage leads, clients, synced appointments, services, payments, and client portals from one clean workspace.

appointments.loadErrorText: Refresh the page and try again.
appointments.title: Appointments Calendar
appointments.subtitle: All appointments are synced from the CRM, services, business hours, and client records. Create, edit, cancel, and open a client file directly from each booking.
appointments.calendarHint: Click a day to filter the synced appointment list.
appointments.syncedListAll: All CRM appointments in one place
appointments.searchPlaceholder: Search by client, phone, email, or service...
appointments.emptyText: Create a new appointment or change the filter.
appointments.workHoursSynced: Appointment slots update automatically when you save hours in the CRM.
appointments.workHoursNeeded: Set business hours to enable appointment booking on the calendar.
appointments.noWorkHoursConfirm:
Business hours are not set. To schedule appointments you need to define hours in the CRM.

Go to hours settings?
appointments.noClientFile: No client file was found for this appointment
appointments.noEmail: This client does not have an email address.
appointments.emailReminderBody:
Hi {{name}},

This is a reminder for your appointment on {{date}} at {{time}}.

Thank you.
appointments.modalSubtitle: Select a client, service, date, and available time.
appointments.clientDetailsSubtitle: Select an existing client or enter details manually.
appointments.appointmentDetailsSubtitle: Available times are synced with the business hours.
appointments.requiredHint: Client name, phone, service, date, and time are required before saving.

services.title: Services, prices, and durations
services.subtitle: Manage your service catalog, prices, appointment durations, descriptions, and images from one clean CRM workspace.
services.formSubtitle: Define service details, price, duration, and image.
services.emptyText: Add your first service so clients can book appointments with the correct price and duration.
services.namePriceRequired: Service name and price are required

settings.heroSubtitle: Manage your business profile, working hours, special dates, booking rules, reminders, branding and security from one clean CRM workspace.
settings.setupSubtitle: Choose which settings area you want to manage.

general.title: Business profile
general.description: These details are used across your CRM, reminders and business profile.
general.businessNameHelper: Displayed inside the CRM and business profile.
general.businessEmailHelper: Used for client communication and alerts.
general.businessPhoneHelper: Main phone number shown to clients.
general.sendFromEmailHelper: The email address used for CRM reminders.
general.servicesHelper: Services stay as a main CRM module.
general.overviewSubtitle: Live status of this CRM setup

specialDates.title: Exceptions and blocked dates
specialDates.description: Block full dates, block a specific time range, or define special opening hours for one date.
specialDates.tipText: Use this for holidays, vacations, private events or special opening hours.

bookingRules.title: Appointment booking limits
bookingRules.description: Control how clients can book, cancel and schedule appointments.
bookingRules.minNoticeHelper: How many hours before an appointment clients can book.
bookingRules.maxWindowHelper: How many days ahead clients can book.
bookingRules.cancellationHelper: How many hours before the appointment clients can cancel.
bookingRules.approvalModeHelper: Choose if bookings are approved automatically or manually.
bookingRules.tipText: These rules should later control the public booking slots and appointment approval flow.

notifications.title: Reminders and follow-ups
notifications.description: Configure reminders, follow-ups and sender email.
notifications.sendFromEmailHelper: Used as the sender for reminder emails.
notifications.reminderBeforeHelper: How many hours before the appointment to remind.
notifications.followUpAfterHelper: How many days after appointment to create follow-up.
notifications.tipText: Later this tab can control automatic reminders, follow-up messages and campaign rules.

branding.title: CRM brand preview
branding.description: Control CRM brand color and visual preview.
branding.primaryColorHelper: Brand color used for CRM customization.
branding.businessNameHelper: Displayed in previews and client portal.

security.title: CRM protection and permissions
security.description: Keep business data protected and prepare worker permissions.
security.protectedCrmText: Your CRM security settings are ready for protected client data.
security.privateFilesText: Client details and private portal variables should stay behind login.
security.futurePermissionsText: Later you can add role permissions for workers, admins and clients.
security.tipText: This area can later include employee roles, client portal access and admin controls.

workHours.heroSubtitle: Set your weekly availability so appointments and booking slots match your real business schedule.
workHours.settingsSubtitle: Define which days are open and control the time range clients can use for appointments.
workHours.scheduleSubtitle: Choose which days are open and define the start/end time for each day.
workHours.tip1: Keep at least one day closed for rest or admin work.
workHours.tip2: Use realistic hours so clients cannot book outside your availability.
workHours.tip3: After changing hours, save to refresh booking slots.
workHours.bookingRulesTipText: For blocked dates, holidays or special hours, use the Special Dates tab inside CRM Setup.

leads.title: Lead Management
leads.subtitle: Professional lead table, full client profile, notes and tasks as part of the timeline, including on-site reminders by due time.
leads.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, email, source, or lead details...
leads.emptyDescription: When a new lead comes in, it will appear here with all form fields.

errors.leadNotFound: The lead linked to the notification was not found.
errors.openFromNotificationFailed: Failed to open the lead from the notification
errors.taskDueRequired: To save a task, choose a due date and time.
errors.saveActivityFailed: Failed to save the activity. Check that the activities API is updated.

drawer.noFormData: There is no additional form data for this lead

drawer.notePlaceholder: Write a note, call summary, or customer update here...
drawer.noActivities: There are no activities for this lead yet
drawer.profileSummaryText: All activities and tasks appear in the profile center in chronological order.

clients.subtitle: Manage client profiles, client appointments, custom data, and private portal access from one clean CRM workspace.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search clients by name, phone, or email...
clients.loadFailedDescription: Refresh the page and try again.
clients.emptyDescription: Create your first CRM client, or let the system add clients automatically from public bookings.

profile.title: Client Profile
profile.subtitle: Basic CRM details only. Custom values are managed in the Client Data tab.

appointmentsPanel.title: Client Appointments
appointmentsPanel.subtitle: Only appointments linked to this client are shown here.
appointmentsPanel.emptyDescription: This client's appointments will appear here after they are scheduled.

clientDataPanel.title: Client data
clientDataPanel.subtitle: Only data fields already configured in the CRM are filled here. Fields are not configured here new.
clientDataPanel.emptyTitle: No client data fields have been configured yet
clientDataPanel.emptyDescription: Fields are configured in the central CRM / Mini SaaS settings. After configuration they will automatically appear here for each client.
clientDataPanel.tabDescription: Personal values based on the fields configured in the CRM

portal.title: Portal access
portal.subtitle: Enable client access to the private portal, separately from client data and appointments.
portal.privateAccessHint: When active, the client can log in to the website according to the permissions.
portal.inviteAlert: The invitation status was updated. Connect this button to the email sending endpoint when it is ready.
portal.tabDescription: Login permissions for the private client portal

form.subtitle: Save client details once and use them across appointments, client data, and client files.
